title: Hantavirus cluster - MV Hondius
locationLabel: MV Hondius off Cape Verde / Praia area
locationLabelEn: MV Hondius off Cape Verde / Praia area
notes: WHO reported eight cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster, including three deaths. Five of the eight cases were confirmed as hantavirus.
notesEn: WHO reported eight cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster, including three deaths. Five of the eight cases were confirmed as hantavirus.

title: Suspected hantavirus cases - MV Hondius
notes: Part of the total eight reported cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster were not yet confirmed at the time of WHO's update.
notesEn: Part of the total eight reported cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster were not yet confirmed at the time of WHO's update.

title: ECDC preliminary assessment
locationLabel: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
locationLabelEn: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
notes: ECDC published a preliminary assessment and recommendations for the cruise-ship-associated hantavirus cluster.
notesEn: ECDC published a preliminary assessment and recommendations for the cruise-ship-associated hantavirus cluster.

title: WHO disease outbreak notice
notes: WHO reported that a cluster of severe respiratory illness aboard a cruise ship had been notified on 2 May 2026.
notesEn: WHO reported that a cluster of severe respiratory illness aboard a cruise ship had been notified on 2 May 2026.

title: Ship isolation near Praia
notes: Passengers and crew were reported to be in isolation after Cape Verde authorities barred the ship from docking.
notesEn: Passengers and crew were reported to be in isolation after Cape Verde authorities barred the ship from docking.

title: Medevac aircraft stop - Gran Canaria
notes: A plane carrying evacuees from the MV Hondius landed in Gran Canaria after Morocco refused a landing request, according to regional government sources cited by AFP.
notesEn: A plane carrying evacuees from the MV Hondius landed in Gran Canaria after Morocco refused a landing request, according to regional government sources cited by AFP.

title: Reported medevac stopover refusal - Morocco
notes: Media reports said Morocco refused a stopover or landing request for an air ambulance linked to the MV Hondius evacuation. Exact official reason was not immediately clear.
notesEn: Media reports said Morocco refused a stopover or landing request for an air ambulance linked to the MV Hondius evacuation. Exact official reason was not immediately clear.

title: MV Hondius expected in Tenerife
notes: The ship was reported to be heading toward Tenerife, with repatriation and quarantine measures being arranged for passengers.
notesEn: The ship was reported to be heading toward Tenerife, with repatriation and quarantine measures being arranged for passengers.

title: Medical evacuation to the Netherlands
notes: Patients with suspected hantavirus from the MV Hondius were reported to be evacuated to the Netherlands aboard medical aircraft.
notesEn: Patients with suspected hantavirus from the MV Hondius were reported to be evacuated to the Netherlands aboard medical aircraft.

title: Passengers disembarked at Saint Helena
notes: Around 40 passengers were reported to have disembarked at Saint Helena before the outbreak was reported, leading to international tracing efforts.
notesEn: Around 40 passengers were reported to have disembarked at Saint Helena before the outbreak was reported, leading to international tracing efforts.

title: Flight contact tracing - Johannesburg route
notes: Two Singapore residents were on the same flight from Saint Helena to Johannesburg as a confirmed hantavirus case who later died in South Africa.
notesEn: Two Singapore residents were on the same flight from Saint Helena to Johannesburg as a confirmed hantavirus case who later died in South Africa.

title: Singapore residents isolated and tested
locationLabel: National Centre for Infectious Diseases, Singapore
locationLabelEn: National Centre for Infectious Diseases, Singapore
notes: Singapore isolated and tested two residents after exposure linked to the MV Hondius outbreak. One had mild symptoms and the other was asymptomatic.
notesEn: Singapore isolated and tested two residents after exposure linked to the MV Hondius outbreak. One had mild symptoms and the other was asymptomatic.

title: Texas passengers contacted by health officials
titleEn: Texas passengers contacted by health officials
notes: The U.S. CDC notified Texas health officials that two Texas residents had been passengers on the MV Hondius. They were contacted and reported no symptoms.
notesEn: The U.S. CDC notified Texas health officials that two Texas residents had been passengers on the MV Hondius. They were contacted and reported no symptoms.

title: U.S. federal monitoring statement
locationLabel: United States CDC / State Department response
locationLabelEn: United States CDC / State Department response
notes: The U.S. government said it was monitoring the MV Hondius situation with confirmed hantavirus and coordinating around U.S. passengers.
notesEn: The U.S. government said it was monitoring the MV Hondius situation with confirmed hantavirus and coordinating around U.S. passengers.

title: UK passengers advised to isolate
notes: UK authorities were reported to ask British passengers linked to the MV Hondius to isolate after returning to the UK.
notesEn: UK authorities were reported to ask British passengers linked to the MV Hondius to isolate after returning to the UK.
